functions.name: getgenv
functions.description: Returns the executor's global environment table that persists across all executed scripts.
functions.verified_source: UNC (UNCCheckEnv.lua), Synapse X, Sentinel, Krnl, Hydrogen

functions.name: getrenv
functions.description: Returns the global environment table for the Roblox game context.

functions.name: getreg
functions.description: Returns the Lua registry table containing all Lua objects.

functions.name: getgc
functions.description: Returns a table of all objects tracked by Lua's garbage collector.

functions.name: getsenv
functions.description: Returns the global environment table of a specific LocalScript or ModuleScript.

functions.name: getmenv
functions.description: Returns the module environment of a script, similar to getsenv but for module context.

functions.name: gettenv
functions.description: Returns a thread's environment table; if no thread is provided, uses the current thread.

functions.name: getcallingscript
functions.description: Returns the script that called the current function, or nil if called from the executor.

functions.name: getscriptclosure
functions.description: Returns a recreated closure for the given script's source code.

functions.name: getscriptbytecode
functions.description: Dumps the bytecode of a script as a binary string.

functions.name: getscripthash
functions.description: Returns a unique hash string representing the script's current source code.

functions.name: getinstances
functions.description: Returns a table of all Instance objects currently in the game hierarchy.

functions.name: getnilinstances
functions.description: Returns a table of all Instance objects parented to nil.

functions.name: getrunningscripts
functions.description: Returns a table of all currently running LocalScript and ModuleScript instances.

functions.name: getscripts
functions.description: Returns a table of all script instances (LocalScript and ModuleScript) in the game.

functions.name: getloadedmodules
functions.description: Returns a table of all ModuleScript instances that have been required/loaded.

functions.name: identifyexecutor
functions.description: Returns the name and version number of the current executor.

functions.name: loadstring
functions.description: Compiles a string of Lua source code into a function; returns the function and any error message.

functions.name: loadfile
functions.description: Loads and compiles a Lua file from the workspace folder into a function.

functions.name: isluau
functions.description: Returns true if the game is using the Luau VM (always true for modern Roblox).

functions.name: decompile
functions.description: Decompiles a script and returns its source code as a string, or bytecode if specified.

functions.name: setfflag
functions.description: Sets a Roblox FastFlag to a specified value at runtime.

functions.name: gethui
functions.description: Returns a hidden Instance parented to nil that can be used to store GUI objects.

functions.name: getcustomasset
functions.description: Returns a rbxasset:// URL for a file in the workspace folder that can be used in-game.

functions.name: isexecutorclosure
functions.description: Returns true if the given function originates from the executor environment.

functions.name: clonefunction
functions.description: Creates a duplicate copy of a function that behaves identically but is a different reference.

functions.name: newcclosure
functions.description: Wraps a Luau closure in a C closure, used for hooking metamethods on Roblox userdata.

functions.name: iscclosure
functions.description: Returns true if the given function is a C closure.

functions.name: islclosure
functions.description: Returns true if the given function is a Luau (Lua) closure.

functions.name: checkcaller
functions.description: Returns true if the current thread/call originates from the executor.

functions.name: hookfunction
functions.description: Replaces the target function with the hook and returns the original function reference.

functions.name: cloneref
functions.description: Creates a reference clone of an Instance that compares unequal but points to the same object.

functions.name: compareinstances
functions.description: Compares two Instance references for equality, ignoring cloneref wrapping.

functions.name: getrawmetatable
functions.description: Returns the metatable of an object without invoking the __metatable metamethod.

functions.name: setrawmetatable
functions.description: Sets the metatable of an object directly, bypassing the __metatable metamethod.

functions.name: hookmetamethod
functions.parameters: object obj, string metamethod, function hook
functions.description: Hooks a metamethod on an object and returns the original metamethod function.

functions.name: isreadonly
functions.description: Returns true if the given table is set to read-only mode.

functions.name: setreadonly
functions.description: Sets whether a table is read-only or writable.

functions.name: gethiddenproperty
functions.description: Gets the value of a hidden property on an Instance that is not normally accessible.

functions.name: sethiddenproperty
functions.parameters: Instance instance, string property, any value
functions.description: Sets the value of a hidden property on an Instance.

functions.name: getscriptable
functions.description: Returns whether a property on an Instance is accessible from scripts.

functions.name: setscriptable
functions.parameters: Instance instance, string property, boolean scriptable
functions.description: Sets whether a property on an Instance can be accessed from scripts.

functions.name: getnamecallmethod
functions.description: Returns the name of the method being called in a __namecall metamethod context.

functions.name: setnamecallmethod
functions.description: Overrides the method name in a __namecall metamethod context.

functions.name: cache.invalidate
functions.description: Invalidates the cached reference to an Instance, forcing a fresh lookup.

functions.name: cache.iscached
functions.description: Returns true if an Instance reference is currently cached by the executor.

functions.name: cache.replace
functions.description: Replaces an Instance reference in the executor's cache with another Instance.

functions.name: getinstancecachekey
functions.description: Returns the cache key used internally for an Instance reference.

functions.name: getspecialinfo
functions.description: Returns special property data for UnionOperations, MeshParts, and Terrain instances.

functions.name: isnetworkowner
functions.description: Returns true if the local client has network ownership of the given BasePart.

functions.name: getallthreads
functions.description: Returns a table of all active Lua threads in the game.

functions.name: getthreadobject
functions.description: Returns the script Instance associated with a Lua thread.

functions.name: readfile
functions.description: Reads and returns the contents of a file in the executor's workspace folder.

functions.name: writefile
functions.description: Writes data to a file in the executor's workspace folder, creating it if needed.

functions.name: appendfile
functions.description: Appends data to the end of a file in the workspace folder.

functions.name: makefolder
functions.description: Creates a new folder in the executor's workspace directory.

functions.name: isfile
functions.description: Returns true if the given path points to an existing file.

functions.name: isfolder
functions.description: Returns true if the given path points to an existing folder.

functions.name: delfile
functions.description: Deletes a file from the executor's workspace folder.

functions.name: delfolder
functions.description: Deletes a folder and its contents from the executor's workspace.

functions.name: listfiles
functions.description: Returns a table of all files and subdirectories in the given folder path.

functions.name: runfile
functions.description: Executes a Lua file from the workspace folder directly.

functions.name: Drawing
functions.description: The Drawing API table that provides access to Drawing.new and Drawing.Fonts.

functions.name: Drawing.new
functions.description: Creates a new 2D drawing object of the specified class (Line, Circle, Square, Triangle, Text, Quad, Image).

functions.name: Drawing.Fonts
functions.description: A table of font constants for use with Drawing Text objects (e.g. Drawing.Fonts.UI, Drawing.Fonts.Plex).

functions.name: Drawing.new("Line")
functions.description: A 2D line with From, To, Color, Thickness, and Transparency properties.

functions.name: Drawing.new("Circle")
functions.description: A 2D circle with Position, Radius, Color, Thickness, Filled, NumSides, and Transparency properties.

functions.name: Drawing.new("Square")
functions.description: A 2D square/rectangle with Position, Size, Color, Thickness, Filled, and Transparency properties.

functions.name: Drawing.new("Triangle")
functions.description: A 2D triangle with PointA, PointB, PointC, Color, Thickness, Filled, and Transparency properties.

functions.name: Drawing.new("Text")
functions.description: 2D text with Text, Position, Color, Size, Center, Outline, Font, and Transparency properties.

functions.name: Drawing.new("Quad")
functions.description: A 2D quadrilateral with four point vertices, Color, Filled, Thickness, and Transparency.

functions.name: Drawing.new("Image")
functions.description: A 2D image with Data (base64), Position, Size, Rounding, Color, and Transparency properties.

functions.name: cleardrawcache
functions.description: Clears all active Drawing objects from the render cache.

functions.name: isrenderobj
functions.description: Returns true if the given userdata is a valid Drawing/render object.

functions.name: getrenderproperty
functions.description: Gets a property value from a Drawing/render object.

functions.name: setrenderproperty
functions.parameters: userdata obj, string property, any value
functions.description: Sets a property value on a Drawing/render object.

functions.name: request
functions.description: Sends an HTTP request with Url, Method, Headers, and Body fields and returns the response.

functions.name: websocket.connect
functions.description: Opens a WebSocket connection to the specified URL and returns a WebSocket object.

functions.name: mouse1click
functions.description: Simulates a complete left mouse button click (press then release).

functions.name: mouse1press
functions.description: Simulates pressing and holding the left mouse button.

functions.name: mouse1release
functions.description: Simulates releasing the left mouse button.

functions.name: mouse2click
functions.description: Simulates a complete right mouse button click.

functions.name: mouse2press
functions.description: Simulates pressing and holding the right mouse button.

functions.name: mouse2release
functions.description: Simulates releasing the right mouse button.

functions.name: mousemoveabs
functions.description: Moves the mouse cursor to absolute coordinates relative to the game window.

functions.name: mousemoverel
functions.description: Moves the mouse cursor by a relative offset from the current position.

functions.name: mousescroll
functions.description: Simulates scrolling the mouse wheel by the specified amount.

functions.name: keypress
functions.description: Simulates pressing and holding a keyboard key by its virtual keycode.

functions.name: keyrelease
functions.description: Simulates releasing a keyboard key previously held by keypress.

functions.name: isrbxactive
functions.description: Returns true if the Roblox game window is currently focused/active.

functions.name: fireclickdetector
functions.description: Simulates clicking a ClickDetector instance, optionally at a specified distance.

functions.name: firetouchinterest
functions.parameters: Instance part, Instance touchTransmitter, number toggle
functions.description: Fires a touch interest event between a Part and TouchTransmitter (toggle 0=touch, 1=untouch).

functions.name: firesignal
functions.description: Fires an RBXScriptSignal with the provided arguments, triggering all connected functions.

functions.name: debug.getconstant
functions.description: Returns the constant at the specified index in a function or stack level.

functions.name: debug.getconstants
functions.description: Returns a table of all constants in a function or stack level.

functions.name: debug.getinfo
functions.description: Returns a table with info about a function including source, what, name, nups, and func.

functions.name: debug.getproto
functions.parameters: function f, number index, boolean? all
functions.description: Returns the inner function (proto) at the given index; if all is true, returns all instances.

functions.name: debug.getprotos
functions.description: Returns a table of all inner functions (protos) defined within a function.

functions.name: debug.getstack
functions.description: Returns a table of all values at a specific stack level, or a single value if indexed.

functions.name: debug.getupvalue
functions.description: Returns the upvalue at the specified index in a function or stack level.

functions.name: debug.getupvalues
functions.description: Returns a table of all upvalues in a function or stack level.

functions.name: debug.setconstant
functions.parameters: function | number f, number idx, any value
functions.description: Sets the constant at the specified index in a function to a new value.

functions.name: debug.setstack
functions.parameters: number level, number idx, any value
functions.description: Sets a value at the specified index of a stack level.

functions.name: debug.setupvalue
functions.parameters: function | number f, number idx, any value
functions.description: Sets the upvalue at the specified index in a function to a new value.

functions.name: debug.getmetatable
functions.description: Returns the metatable of any value without invoking the __metatable metamethod.

functions.name: debug.setmetatable
functions.description: Sets the metatable of a value, including primitive types.

functions.name: debug.profilebegin
functions.description: Begins a microprofiler section with the given label for performance analysis.

functions.name: debug.profileend
functions.description: Ends the current microprofiler section started with debug.profilebegin.

functions.name: debug.traceback
functions.description: Returns a string traceback of the call stack, optionally with a prepended message.

functions.name: debug.getregistry
functions.description: Returns the Lua registry table, equivalent to getreg().

functions.name: debug.getcallstack
functions.description: Returns the call stack as a table of function entries.

functions.name: debug.info
functions.description: Returns information about a function or stack level based on a format string (e.g., 'slna').

functions.name: debug.validlevel
functions.description: Returns true if the given stack level is valid/accessible.

functions.name: debug.setmemorycategory
functions.description: Sets a custom memory profiling category for tracking allocations.

functions.name: debug.resetmemorycategory
functions.description: Resets the memory category label for the microprofiler.

functions.name: getregistry
functions.description: Returns the Lua registry; alias for getreg() and debug.getregistry().

functions.name: getupvalue
functions.description: Returns the upvalue at the given index for a function; non-debug-prefixed version.

functions.name: getupvalues
functions.description: Returns all upvalues for a function; non-debug-prefixed version.

functions.name: crypt.base64encode
functions.description: Encodes a string using Base64 encoding.

functions.name: crypt.base64decode
functions.description: Decodes a Base64-encoded string back to its original form.

functions.name: crypt.encrypt
functions.parameters: string data, string key, string? iv, string mode
functions.description: Encrypts data using AES with the specified key, IV, and cipher mode (CBC, ECB, etc.).

functions.name: crypt.decrypt
functions.parameters: string data, string key, string? iv, string mode
functions.description: Decrypts AES-encrypted data using the specified key, IV, and cipher mode.

functions.name: crypt.generatebytes
functions.description: Generates a string of random bytes of the specified length for use in cryptographic operations.

functions.name: crypt.generatekey
functions.description: Generates a random AES encryption key suitable for use with crypt.encrypt/decrypt.

functions.name: crypt.hash
functions.description: Computes a cryptographic hash of data using the specified algorithm (SHA256, MD5, etc.).

functions.name: md5hash
functions.description: Computes the MD5 hash of a string.

functions.name: sha384hash
functions.description: Computes the SHA-384 hash of a string.

functions.name: rconsolecreate
functions.description: Creates and opens the executor's console window.

functions.name: rconsoleprint
functions.description: Prints a message to the executor's console window.

functions.name: rconsoleclear
functions.description: Clears all text in the executor's console window.

functions.name: rconsoledestroy
functions.description: Destroys and closes the executor's console window.

functions.name: rconsoleinput
functions.description: Yields execution and waits for user input from the console, returning the entered text.

functions.name: rconsolesettitle
functions.description: Sets the title bar text of the executor's console window.

functions.name: messagebox
functions.parameters: string text, string caption, number? flags
functions.description: Displays a Windows message box and returns the button ID that was clicked.

functions.name: getconnections
functions.description: Returns a table of all connected functions to an RBXScriptSignal, with Enable/Disable methods.

functions.name: fireproximityprompt
functions.description: Simulates firing/activating a ProximityPrompt instance as if the player interacted with it.

functions.name: getthreadidentity
functions.description: Returns the current thread's security context level (identity).

functions.name: setthreadidentity
functions.description: Sets the current thread's security context level for accessing restricted operations.

functions.name: queue_on_teleport
functions.description: Queues a script to be automatically executed when the player teleports to another place.

functions.name: setfpscap
functions.description: Sets the executor's frames-per-second cap (0 for unlimited).

functions.name: setclipboard
functions.description: Copies the provided text to the system clipboard.

functions.name: bit.arshift
functions.description: Performs an arithmetic right shift of n bits on x.

functions.name: bit.band
functions.description: Performs a bitwise AND operation on two numbers.

functions.name: bit.bnot
functions.description: Performs a bitwise NOT operation on a number, flipping all bits.

functions.name: bit.bor
functions.description: Performs a bitwise OR operation on two numbers.

functions.name: bit.bxor
functions.description: Performs a bitwise XOR (exclusive OR) operation on two numbers.

functions.name: bit.lshift
functions.description: Performs a logical left shift of n bits on x.

functions.name: bit.rshift
functions.description: Performs a logical right shift of n bits on x.

functions.name: bit.rol
functions.description: Performs a left bitwise rotation of n bits on x.

functions.name: bit.ror
functions.description: Performs a right bitwise rotation of n bits on x.

functions.name: bit.tobit
functions.description: Normalizes a number to a 32-bit signed integer for bitwise operations.

functions.name: bit.tohex
functions.description: Converts a number to its hexadecimal string representation.

functions.name: bit.bswap
functions.description: Swaps the byte order of a 32-bit integer (big-endian to little-endian or vice versa).

functions.name: bit.extract
functions.parameters: number x, number field, number? width
functions.description: Extracts a range of bits from a number starting at the given field position.

functions.name: bit.replace
functions.parameters: number v, number r, number field, number? width
functions.description: Replaces a range of bits in v with bits from r at the specified field position.

functions.name: bit.countlz
functions.description: Counts the number of leading zero bits in a 32-bit integer.

functions.name: bit.countrz
functions.description: Counts the number of trailing zero bits in a 32-bit integer.

functions.name: bit.btest
functions.description: Returns true if the bitwise AND of a and b is non-zero.

functions.name: delta:AddTab
functions.description: Adds a new tab to the Delta executor's main menu with an optional pre-loaded script.

functions.name: delta:SetCurrentSuggestionScript
functions.parameters: string name, string description, function onClick
functions.description: Adds a script suggestion to the Delta main menu that executes the provided function when clicked.

functions.name: delta:SaveScript
functions.parameters: string name, string source, string? tag
functions.description: Saves a script to the Delta local scripts menu with a name, source code, and optional tag.

functions.name: delta.Settings:AddButton
functions.parameters: string label, string description, function onClick
functions.description: Adds a clickable button to the Delta plugin settings panel.

functions.name: delta.Settings:AddSwitch
functions.parameters: string label, string description, boolean defaultState, function onToggle
functions.description: Adds a toggle switch to the Delta plugin settings with a callback that receives the state.

functions.name: delta.Settings:AddInput
functions.parameters: string label, string description, function onSubmit
functions.description: Adds a text input field to the Delta plugin settings with a callback that receives the text.

functions.name: delta.Settings:AddDropdown
functions.parameters: string label, string description, string defaultOption, table options, function onSelect
functions.description: Adds a dropdown selector to the Delta plugin settings with predefined options.

functions.name: emulate_call
functions.description: Calls a function while spoofing the calling context to appear as if it's from the game.

functions.name: secure_call
functions.description: Executes a function in a secure/protected environment with elevated permissions.

functions.name: protect_gui
functions.description: Protects a GUI instance from being removed or modified by the game's anti-cheat.

functions.name: run_on_actor
functions.description: Executes a function on a specific Actor instance context.

functions.name: getcurrentline
functions.description: Returns the current source line number being executed in the script.

functions.name: require
functions.description: Loads and returns the result of a ModuleScript, with executor-level support for asset IDs.

functions.name: getmoduleunlocked
functions.description: Returns true if a ModuleScript has been fully executed/unlocked by the require system.

functions.name: setmoduleunlocked
functions.description: Manually sets the unlocked state of a ModuleScript in the require cache.

functions.name: luau_compile
functions.description: Compiles Luau source code into bytecode string format.

functions.name: luau_load
functions.description: Loads compiled Luau bytecode into an executable function with an optional environment.

functions.name: getnetworkmode
functions.description: Returns the current network mode setting of the executor.

functions.name: setnetworkmode
functions.description: Sets the executor's network mode for handling HTTP requests.

functions.name: syn.dumpstring
functions.description: Dumps the raw bytecode of a script chunk as a string.

functions.name: syn.getloadedmodules
functions.description: Returns a table of all ModuleScript instances loaded in the game (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.getgc
functions.description: Returns the Lua garbage collector list (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.getsenv
functions.description: Returns the environment of a script, or nil if the script is not running (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.getscripts
functions.description: Returns a table of all scripts in the game (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.getcallingscript
functions.description: Returns the script that called the current function (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.getgenv
functions.description: Returns the Synapse executor global environment (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.getinstances
functions.description: Returns all instances in the game hierarchy (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.getreg
functions.description: Returns the Lua registry table (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.getrenv
functions.description: Returns the Roblox game global environment (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.getnilinstances
functions.description: Returns all instances parented to nil (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.getrunningscripts
functions.description: Returns all currently running scripts (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.crypt.encrypt
functions.description: Encrypts data with a key using Synapse's encryption (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.crypt.hash
functions.description: Returns a hash of the provided data (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.crypt.b64.encode
functions.description: Base64 encodes a string (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.crypt.b64.decode
functions.description: Base64 decodes a string (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.crypt.decrypt
functions.description: Decrypts data with a key using Synapse's decryption (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.newcclosure
functions.description: Creates a new C closure wrapping the provided function (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.hookfunction
functions.description: Hooks a target function with a replacement (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.islclosure
functions.description: Checks if a function is a Luau closure (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.checkcaller
functions.description: Checks if the current thread belongs to Synapse (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.context.set
functions.description: Sets the thread context/security level (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.context.get
functions.description: Gets the current thread context/security level (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.fireclickdetector
functions.description: Fires a ClickDetector with optional distance (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.firetouchinterest
functions.parameters: Instance part, Instance transmitter, number toggle
functions.description: Fires a touch interest event (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.getconnections
functions.description: Gets all connections to a signal (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.clipboard.get
functions.description: Gets the current clipboard contents (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.clipboard.set
functions.description: Sets the clipboard content to the provided string (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.console.print
functions.description: Prints text to the Synapse console window (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.console.iprint
functions.description: Prints an [INFO]-prefixed message to the Synapse console (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.console.eprint
functions.description: Prints an [ERR]-prefixed message to the Synapse console (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.console.wprint
functions.description: Prints a [WARN]-prefixed message to the Synapse console (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.console.input
functions.description: Reads user input from the Synapse console, yielding the thread (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.console.input_async
functions.description: Reads user input from the Synapse console asynchronously without yielding the engine (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.console.name
functions.description: Sets the title of the Synapse console window (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.obj.save
functions.description: Saves game instances to a .rbxl file in the workspace folder (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.obj.override
functions.parameters: Instance obj, string property, any value
functions.description: Overrides an Instance property and prevents its network replication (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.obj.specialinfo
functions.description: Returns special mesh/union/terrain data for an Instance (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.decompile
functions.description: Decompiles a script to source code or bytecode (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.isactive
functions.description: Returns true if the Roblox window is currently focused (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.mousemoverel
functions.description: Moves the mouse relative to its current position (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.mousescroll
functions.description: Scrolls the mouse wheel by the specified pixel amount (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.keypress
functions.description: Simulates pressing a key by its virtual keycode (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.keyrelease
functions.description: Simulates releasing a key by its virtual keycode (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.mouse1press
functions.description: Simulates left mouse button press (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.mouse1release
functions.description: Simulates left mouse button release (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.mouse1click
functions.description: Simulates a full left mouse click (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.mouse2press
functions.description: Simulates right mouse button press (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.mouse2release
functions.description: Simulates right mouse button release (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: syn.mouse2click
functions.description: Simulates a full right mouse click (Synapse namespaced).

functions.name: table.islocked
functions.description: Returns true if a table is locked against modifications.

functions.name: table.lock
functions.description: Locks a table to prevent any further modifications.

functions.name: table.unlock
functions.description: Unlocks a previously locked table, allowing modifications again.

functions.name: issentinelclosure
functions.description: Returns true if a function was created by the Sentinel executor.

functions.name: secure_load
functions.description: Loads and executes a script in a secure, isolated environment separate from the main executor context.

functions.name: secure_create
functions.description: Creates a secure script with a given name and source in the secure environment.

functions.name: zip.inflate
functions.description: Decompresses ZIP/deflate-compressed data and returns the uncompressed string.

functions.name: syn.net.websocket
functions.description: Opens a named WebSocket channel (Synapse namespaced).
